arts.ttl: Legia Warsaw vs. Chelsea team news confirmed: Enzo Maresca makes Cole Palmer, Nicolas Jackson decisions
arts.sum: Legia Warsaw and Chelsea announce their starting lineups for the first leg of their Conference League quarter-final on Thursday evening.

arts.ttl: Jobe Bellingham transfer update as Chelsea could land unexpected £45m bargain
arts.sum: football.london says: Chelsea trying to sign Jobe Bellingham this summer seems a no-brainer based on the club's transfer policy over recent windows. Mathys Tel could reportedly become a Chelsea target again if Tottenham Hotspur opts against permanently signing the Bayern Munich player during the summer transfer window .

arts.ttl: Eleven players could miss Legia Warsaw vs Chelsea as Enzo Maresca provides double injury update
arts.sum: So, with that being said, football.london has rounded-up the latest injury news, as Chelsea gear-up to face Legia Warsaw. As many as 11 players could miss Chelsea's match vs Legia Warsaw in the first leg of the UEFA Conference League.

arts.ttl: Legia Warsaw vs Chelsea Conference League clash predicted with red card drama
arts.sum: Chelsea travel to Poland later today as the Blues look to get off to a winning start in their Conference League quarter-final clash against Legia Warsaw. Wins in both legs saw Chelsea beat Copenhagen 3-1 on aggregate in the last round of the Conference League, setting up the quarter-final clash with Legia Warsaw who beat Norwegian side Molde 4-3 on aggregate.

arts.ttl: Moises Caicedo drops early Chelsea team news hint as Enzo Maresca explains Cole Palmer decision
arts.sum: Moises Caicedo has dropped a team news hint ahead of Chelsea's clash against Legia Warsaw . Maresca added: "When the environment is the one that probably we have tomorrow or the one that I mentioned after Tottenham game at home, it's nice because you have the feeling that you play with an extra player.

arts.ttl: 'It's unfortunate': Chelsea told they had a 'crazy' youth prospect who should've been an incredible player
arts.sum: Chelsea have produced some incredible academy products over the years. Mason Mount won the Champions League with Chelsea, Reece James is the current club captain,...

arts.ttl: Legia Warsaw vs Chelsea - Europa Conference League: Live score, team news and updates as the Blues take on the Polish side away from home in the first leg
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates as Chelsea travel to Poland to take on Legia Warsaw in the Europa Conference League.

arts.ttl: Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall shares 'added incentive' for Chelsea players in Conference League
arts.sum: They're desperate to win the whole thing!

arts.ttl: Chelsea to sign striker this summer with Delap under consideration
arts.sum: Chelsea will sign a striker this summer and Ipswich forward Liam Delap is one of the names under serious consideration.

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea move ahead of Arsenal and six other teams in race to sign wonderkid
arts.sum: Chelsea have jumped ahead in the transfer race to sign another wonderkid. There has been a pretty clear transfer strategy at Chelsea in the past...
